questions.question: What is the main benefit of using workspace extension recommendations?
options: They help the team use the same project tools
questions.explanation: Workspace recommendations help everyone on the team install the tools that matter for that repo.

questions.question: Which tool is usually responsible for code formatting?
questions.explanation: Prettier formats the code, while ESLint focuses on code quality rules.

questions.question: What should you do if an extension duplicates behavior already handled by the project config?
options: Keep both and ignore the warnings
Disable or remove the conflicting extension
Install more extensions to balance it out
Move the config into README only
questions.explanation: Reducing overlap keeps the workspace easier to understand and debug.

questions.question: Why is workspace hygiene important?
options: It prevents the browser from opening
It keeps the environment consistent and easier to maintain
questions.explanation: Clean workspace setup reduces accidental differences between machines and projects.
